title: The Vein Center – World Class Vein Care
heading: Advanced VenaSeal Treatment Center
text: The Vein Center – World Class Vein Care Skip to content Home Dr. Saurabh Joshi Locations Expand Khar West Parel East Navi Mumbai Thane West Malad West Conditions Expand Varicose Veins Venous Leg Ulcer Deep Vein Thrombosis Treatments Expand VenaSeal™ EVLA / EVLT Foam Sclerotherapy Awareness Expand Leech Therapy VenaSeal™ vs. Venablock VenaSeal vs Laser/RFA Achievements Blog More Expand Consultation Charges Online Consultation FAQ Fellowship Contact Us Toggle Menu Advanced VenaSeal Treatment Center Dedicated Center for Varicose Vein Treatment in Mumbai Dedicated to providing advanced, minimally invasive solutions for varicose veins with a focus on patient comfort and rapid recovery. Innovation Efficiency Empathy Book an Appointment Call Now Message Us Over 2,500 Vein Procedures Performed 12+ Years of Clinical Experience 10,000+ Patients Treated ISO 9001:2015 Certified About : The Vein Center The Vein Center runs vascular clinics at Khar West, Andheri East, Parel East, Grant Road, Malad West, Thane West, Kopar Khairane, Kolhapur and Dar es Salaam (Tanzania), offering structured consultations, diagnostic evaluation, and treatment for people with leg discomfort, visible veins, or general circulation complaints. Each Mumbai clinic functions as a registered medical establishment following national and state regulations and professional ethics guidelines. Why Choose The Vein Center? The Vein Center is a specialized Vascular Interventional Radiology clinic chain focused on modern, minimally invasive care. We provide advanced image-guided treatments that replace the need for traditional open surgery, utilizing tiny pinhole incisions for enhanced patient comfort State-of-the-Art Interventional Radiology Clinic Board-Certified Specialists Comprehensive Patient Support Advanced Minimally Invasive Protocols Insurance & Cashless Support Available* Day-Care Procedure (Same-Day Discharge) Expert Interventional Radiologists Low Discomfort & Needle-Hole Techniques Our Expertise We Specialize in Advanced Treatments for Varicose Veins and Venous Ulcers. Varicose Vein Treatment Find effective, long-term relief from varicose veins using minimally invasive techniques (EVLT, VenaSeal™) performed by our specialized Interventional Radiologists in Mumbai. Venous Ulcer Treatment Accelerate the healing of chronic venous ulcers through targeted intervention and comprehensive wound care management guided by our expert medical team. “Treatment choice and results vary by individual; consultation and ultrasound evaluation are essential before deciding a procedure.” Our Specialist Team Consult with our qualified Interventional Radiologists providing specialized vascular care at our clinics in Mumbai, Thane, and Navi Mumbai. Dr. Saurabh Joshi MBBS, MD, FNVIR, MBA Founder & Chief Interventional Radiologist A Senior Consultant with 18+ years of clinical experience specializing in the diagnosis and minimally invasive treatment of complex varicose vein disorders. Voice of Recovery “Patient testimonials reflect individual experiences. Results may vary depending on the severity of the condition and patient history.” Services Across Mumbai Clinics Vein Center functions as an OPD-based vascular clinic and offers: Consultation Consultation with registered medical practitioners for vein and circulation-related complaints in adults. Diagnosis Clinical examination and recommendation of appropriate diagnostic tests and scans where indicated. Treatments Medically indicated treatments for common lower limb vein conditions and circulation complaints in adults. Education Information and counselling on lifestyle, risk factors, and general blood circulation and vein health. Followups Coordination of follow-up visits and medical record maintenance as per regulatory requirements. Consultations Available OP consultations are available in following centers. Enter your address or zip/pin code to find the nearest location and distance. For our consultations in Tanzania, visit veincenter.tz . Online consultations are available for patients from all around the globe. Check our consultation charges and OP schedules here > Charges & Schedule In the News “Leading the conversation on vascular health. Read and watch our latest features, expert opinions, and community outreach updates.” Memberships, Affiliations & Certifications “We are committed to maintaining the highest standards of medical care and safety. The Vein Center and our medical team are registered with and accredited by recognized national and international medical bodies.” Facebook Instagram X.com YouTube International EVUI Payment Privacy Policy Insurance Online Consultation Dr. Saurabh Joshi is a registered medical practitioner with the Maharashtra Medical Council (Reg. No: 2005/05/2629) The Vein Center operates in compliance with the Clinical Establishments (Registration and Regulations) Act 2010. Figures based on internal clinical records updated December 2025. We value transparency. Costs listed are estimated standard rates; final pricing is determined after medical consultation.
